recordings.title: TumorCrusher Tyler Cruz long reference
recordings.reuseCommand: Reference only. Use this to tune the free DJ generator; do not rerender unless needed.
recordings.notes: Longer paid Tyler Cruz reference generated once to guide the free Windows SAPI DJ pacing, pauses, and hype contour.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher three-voice open-source DJ ASCO 2026 Day 1 intro
recordings.notes: Generated locally with Kokoro open-source neural TTS and FFmpeg broadcast processing. Puck opens, Fenrir takes the middle, and Adam closes with crossfaded handoffs. Spoken ASCO is rendered as ASKO, and Adam uses the heavier club-DJ bass pass. Normal video reruns use scripts\render-day1-opening.ps1 and reuse this cached MP3 without ElevenLabs charges.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Kokoro Puck one-minute booth pass
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro Puck voice segment used as the opening host in the three-voice handoff.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Kokoro Fenrir one-minute booth pass
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro Fenrir voice segment used as the middle host in the three-voice handoff.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher Kokoro Adam one-minute booth pass
recordings.notes: One-minute open-source Kokoro Adam voice segment used as the closing host in the three-voice handoff, with extra low-end weight and higher club-DJ energy.

recordings.title: TumorCrusher ASCO 2026 Day 1 one-minute intro
recordings.notes: Renderer copies this cached MP3 into day1-opening-voice.mp3 when the working voice file is missing, avoiding a new ElevenLabs charge for reruns.
